title: Gambling Disorder Helplines - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Gambling Disorder Helplines 3 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADIA HEALTH CASCADIA TALBERT HEALTH CENTER HEALTH CENTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health counseling for individuals and families, individual and group, as well as gambling addiction counseling, primary care, and substance use disorder (SUD) services, including Adult Outpatient/Recovery day services and supportive employment. 12360 SE Sunnyside Road Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5:30pm, Saturday 8:30am-2pm Intake Phone Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 303-4000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GAMBLERS ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about 12-step support groups and other resources related to the topic of problem gambling. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (855) 222-5542 855-2 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON PROBLEM GAMBLING RESOURCE OREGON PROBLEM GAMBLING HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a confidential gambling helpline staffed by trained professionals who listen, answer questions, and provide referrals to counseling when needed. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Text or Chat: Monday-Friday 9am-9pm (877) 695-4648 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADIA HEALTH HEALTH CENTER SERVICES
